r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: isSlotTaken_shouldReturnTrue_whenActiveReservationExists
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select case when count(r1_0.reservationId)>0 then true else false end from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.startTime=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: isSlotTaken_shouldReturnFalse_whenDifferentMachineIsUsed
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select case when count(r1_0.reservationId)>0 then true else false end from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.startTime=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: findByMachineIdAndDate_shouldExcludeCancelledReservations
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservationId,r1_0.createdAt,r1_0.date,r1_0.endTime,r1_0.price,r1_0.startTime,r1_0.status,r1_0.studentId,r1_0.washDuration,r1_0.washType,r1_0.machineId from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: isSlotTaken_shouldReturnFalse_whenNoReservationExists
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select case when count(r1_0.reservationId)>0 then true else false end from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.startTime=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: findByMachineIdAndDate_shouldReturnEmpty_whenNoReservationsForDate
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservationId,r1_0.createdAt,r1_0.date,r1_0.endTime,r1_0.price,r1_0.startTime,r1_0.status,r1_0.studentId,r1_0.washDuration,r1_0.washType,r1_0.machineId from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: findByMachineIdAndDate_shouldReturnMultipleReservations
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservationId,r1_0.createdAt,r1_0.date,r1_0.endTime,r1_0.price,r1_0.startTime,r1_0.status,r1_0.studentId,r1_0.washDuration,r1_0.washType,r1_0.machineId from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: isSlotTaken_shouldReturnFalse_whenReservationIsCancelled
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select case when count(r1_0.reservationId)>0 then true else false end from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.startTime=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: isSlotTaken_shouldReturnFalse_whenDifferentDateIsUsed
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select case when count(r1_0.reservationId)>0 then true else false end from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.startTime=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'

testcase.name: findByMachineIdAndDate_shouldReturnActiveReservations
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into Washmachine (isOpen,machineNr,status,timeRemaining,type,users,machineId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into Student (balance,email,nachname,password,role,vorname,"studentId") values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into reservation (createdAt,date,endTime,price,startTime,status,studentId,washDuration,washType,machineId,reservationId) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservationId,r1_0.createdAt,r1_0.date,r1_0.endTime,r1_0.price,r1_0.startTime,r1_0.status,r1_0.studentId,r1_0.washDuration,r1_0.washType,r1_0.machineId from reservation r1_0 where r1_0.machineId=? and r1_0.date=? and r1_0.status='active'
